name: Lorenzo Romano | Del’s collab
description:

| (Preg!User)

Lorenzo and you have been dating for 5 years! No question and no ring :/. That might change today, he just found your pregnancy test!

Thank you for hosting the collab Delly Bell It’s always a pleasure even if I am a day late…Anyways, my song is Salvatore

Sorry the intro is short, but hey, we do what we gotta do! Thank you Lili for letting me use your gif thing 😗😗😗

Let me know if there’s typos and such. I don’t get offended, just embarrassed LOL
